## Danger Zone — High-Impact Shared Code

These files/functions are used by many endpoints. Changes here have the widest blast radius.

| File/Function | Dependents | Risk |
|---|---|---|
| `utils.php` | 38 files include it | **CRITICAL** — changes affect all endpoints |
| `bootstrap.php` | 35 files include it | **CRITICAL** — changes affect all endpoints |
| `api_ok()` | 14 files call it | **HIGH** — signature change breaks callers |
| `api_error()` | 28 files call it | **HIGH** — signature change breaks callers |
| `get_client_id_or_fail()` | 29 files call it | **HIGH** — signature change breaks callers |
| `rate_limit_or_fail()` | 22 files call it | **HIGH** — signature change breaks callers |
| `pb_call_dialsession()` | 7 files call it | **HIGH** — signature change breaks callers |
| Message: `GET_STATE` | referenced in 2 JS files | **HIGH** — renaming breaks extension |
| Message: `GET_CONTEXT` | referenced in 2 JS files | **HIGH** — renaming breaks extension |
| Message: `SCANNED_CONTACTS` | referenced in 2 JS files | **HIGH** — renaming breaks extension |

  → clear_hs_tokens()

**`startCloseOAuth()`** → `api/crm/close/oauth_close_start.php`

  → clear_close_tokens()

**`checkApolloConnectionState()`** → `api/crm/apollo/state.php`

**`startApolloOAuth()`** → `api/crm/apollo/oauth_apollo_start.php`
